voice_description: Confident, practical, polished, and helpful product marketing voice for modern software launches.

tone_examples.label: good
tone_examples.text: A concise launch post that explains the product benefit, names the audience, and closes with a specific CTA.

tone_examples.label: avoid
tone_examples.text: A vague hype-heavy post with unsupported claims, filler adjectives, and no real business value.
